themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "The historical detail that the pit where Ishmael disposed of bodies was 'that which Asa the k...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".

themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "The tragedy foretold unfolds: 'in the seventh month' (October 586 BC), approximately two mont...". Word-study detail reinforces "לֶ֛חֶם: bread - food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)".

themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "The remnant's motivation for fleeing to Egypt is explained: 'Because of the Chaldeans: for th...". Word-study detail reinforces "יָרְא֖וּ: for they were afraid - to fear; morally to revere; causatively to frighten".
